prompt:
You are reviewing the Supabase migration below for tenant isolation gaps before deploy. Per-tenant model: each `documents` row belongs to one user (`auth.uid()` is the tenant). Audit the policy posture and produce: (1) per-table posture table; (2) gaps with severity P1/P2/P3 citing concrete failure modes; (3) migration-shaped remediation as ready-to-apply SQL using the actual column names. Migration file content:

```sql
-- migrations/20260605120001_documents.sql
CREATE TABLE documents (
  id uuid PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  user_id uuid NOT NULL,
  title text NOT NULL,
  body text,
  created_at timestamptz DEFAULT now()
);

ALTER TABLE documents ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY;

CREATE POLICY user_owns_doc ON documents
  FOR ALL
  USING (user_id = auth.uid());
```

Auth model: `auth.uid()` (default Supabase). Tenant scope: per-user.
expected_output: Per-table posture table listing `documents`; P1 finding for missing FORCE ROW LEVEL SECURITY + missing WITH CHECK clause on FOR ALL policy (insert path bypass); concrete remediation SQL adding both.
